{{CargoRelic
|name=Statue of Khufo
|class_id=20267
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Carved from ivory, this is a statue of a pharaoh of the fourth dynasty of ancient Egypt. Only those recognized by the pharaoh are qualified to obtain and display this statue.
|fame=19
|art=13
|fth=29
|civ=14
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +30<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +90<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50
|ss4=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +90<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50
|ss7=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +90<br>Quarry LVL: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
